overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with red hair walking along a neon-lit futuristic city street at night. The character passes commercial buildings with holographic billboards, palm trees, and pedestrians before approaching and entering a modern building entrance with reflective water features and red interior lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic commercial street with holographic billboards

agents.ego_description: character with red hair and white jacket walking along the sidewalk past neon-lit commercial buildings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in gray tank top walking toward the camera
pedestrian in white shirt walking past the camera along the railing

entered.detail: tall building facade with multiple holographic advertisement screens displaying bright neon graphics
illuminated digital billboards with cyan and white text and imagery
yellow and black striped safety barriers separating sidewalk from the multi-lane street
tall palm trees lining the street in the distance against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a neon-lit cyberpunk street at night, with the player character walking along a concrete sidewalk. Commercial buildings with large holographic billboards dominate the left side, while the street features moving traffic behind safety barriers. Sparse pedestrians walk in opposing directions, and palm trees are visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm-lined pedestrian walkway with illuminated water features

events.description: transitioning from commercial billboard district to upscale residential entrance area with reflective pools

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway with palm trees and modern architecture on the right side

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt walking along the street railing

entered.detail: dark smooth facade of a luxury building with subtle architectural lighting
rectangular reflecting pool with calm water surface alongside the walkway
square ground-level light fixtures emitting warm white light along the path edge

segments.scene_description: Moving past the commercial district, the scene transitions to a more upscale walkway lined with palm trees and modern architecture. A reflective water feature with illuminated pathway lights appears on the right, while the street and its barriers recede into the left background. The character continues walking toward a building entrance visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury building entrance with glass doors and interior lobby

events.description: approaching the covered building entrance with water features and glass doors
entering through the automatic glass doors into the red-lit interior lobby

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the modern building through automatic glass doors into the lobby

entered.detail: large transparent automatic glass doors with metallic frames leading into the building
deep red ambient lighting visible through the glass doors illuminating the interior lobby
overhanging architectural structure providing cover above the entrance doors

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a luxury building entrance with a reflective water feature and illuminated pathway. The camera moves under a canopy toward automatic glass doors, transitioning from the neon-lit exterior to a red-lit interior lobby. The street elements and palm trees disappear from view as the character enters the building, marking the end of the outdoor urban walk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling, neon-lit cyberpunk street into the moody, red-lit interior of a luxury building. It begins on a concrete sidewalk flanked by towering holographic billboards and moving traffic, with the character walking past sparse pedestrians and distant palm trees. As the character moves beyond the commercial district, the scene shifts toward an upscale walkway where the street barriers recede and a reflective water feature with illuminated pathway lights emerges on the right. The camera then approaches a modern building entrance, gliding under a canopy and through automatic glass doors. Finally, the outdoor urban elements and palm trees disappear from view as the environment transitions from the vibrant neon exterior into a dimly lit red lobby.
